name: rom_entry
notes: Entry point stored in the cartridge header

name: bios_resume_jump
notes: Direct jump to BIOS address 0xFF1800

name: vblank_handler
notes: Installed in the Vertical_Blanking_Int vector at RAM 0x6FCC

name: wait_for_counter_400A
notes: Wait loop involving RAM byte 0x400A

name: initialize_runtime_and_run_main_loop
notes: Initializes engine subsystems then enters the frame loop ending at 0x2001F8

name: vblank_frame_update_callback
notes: Optional VBlank callback that updates scroll and graphics state

name: check_soft_reset_chord
notes: Restarts through the cartridge entry point when A B and Option are held together

name: initial_ram_table
notes: Copied to RAM at 0x6FB8 during startup

name: upload_sprite_state_to_vram
notes: Copies cached sprite attributes and optional palette numbers into K2GE VRAM

name: update_pause_menu
notes: Handles Option presses and dispatches the active pause-menu state

name: bios_com_on_rts
notes: Invokes BIOS vector 0x15 VEC_COMONRTS when BIOS services are available

name: bios_com_off_rts
notes: Invokes BIOS vector 0x16 VEC_COMOFFRTS when BIOS services are available

name: poll_controller_state
notes: Reads Controller_Status and updates current pressed and repeat state at 0x4D40

name: update_button_state
notes: Updates one six-byte current pressed and key-repeat record

name: upload_palettes_if_dirty
notes: Uploads cached background and palette state to K2GE registers when marked dirty

name: upload_window_registers
notes: Copies cached window coordinates into K2GE window registers

name: vblank_restart_timer0_if_enabled
notes: Restarts TLCS-900H Timer 0 when the flag at 0x68E8 is nonzero

name: service_z80_command_queue
notes: Services the TLCS-900H to Z80 communication ring buffer

name: advance_z80_command_queue
notes: Advances the Z80 command queue read index modulo 16

name: timer0_restart_enabled
notes: Controls the Timer 0 restart performed during VBlank

name: controller_state_current
notes: Current raw active-high controller bits

name: controller_state_pressed
notes: Bits that transitioned from released to pressed this poll

name: controller_state_pressed_or_repeat
notes: New presses plus generated key-repeat events

name: controller_repeat_counter
notes: Frame counter used to generate repeated button events

name: controller_repeat_delay
notes: Repeat threshold initialized to six frames
